data.name: .aosproj replaces a dozen arcane Debian files with a single declarative manifest. If you know .csproj, you know packaging.
data.value: .aosproj replaces a dozen arcane Debian files with a single declarative manifest. If you know .csproj, you know packaging.

data.name: Add to Management Cloud and go live
data.value: Add to Management Cloud and go live

data.name: All the power of open-source, backed by enterprise-grade support, management tools, and customisation capabilities.
data.value: All the power of open-source, backed by enterprise-grade support, management tools, and customisation capabilities.

data.name: AnduinOS Enterprise is backed by our 7x24 on-call support team. From initial deployment to ongoing operations, we ensure your fleet stays secure, updated, and running smoothly.
data.value: AnduinOS Enterprise is backed by our 24/7 on-call support team. From initial deployment to ongoing operations, we ensure your fleet remains secure, up to date, and running smoothly.

data.name: AnduinOS Enterprise provides brand customisation, enabling you to replace the system logo with your own.
data.value: AnduinOS Enterprise provides brand customisation, enabling you to replace the system logo with your own.

data.name: AnduinOS is a custom Ubuntu-based Linux distribution that offers a familiar and easy-to-use experience for anyone moving to Linux.
data.value: AnduinOS is a custom Ubuntu-based Linux distribution that offers a familiar and easy-to-use experience for anyone switching to Linux.

data.name: AnduinOS is an open-source project. Following the GPL-v3 license, you can view the source code, modify it, and redistribute it. It's free and will always be free.
data.value: AnduinOS is an open-source project. Under the GPL-v3 licence, you can view, modify, and redistribute the source code. It is free and will always remain so.

data.name: AnduinOS is based on Ubuntu's package base. It's compatible with most of the apt packages from Ubuntu. It's a perfect combination of experience and ecology.
data.value: AnduinOS is built on Ubuntu’s package base. It is compatible with most apt packages from Ubuntu. It offers the perfect blend of user experience and ecosystem.

data.name: AnduinOS wakes up almost as fast as you can blink. Wait time? What's that? Lightning-fast start-up on any hardware.
data.value: AnduinOS starts up almost as fast as you can blink. Wait time? What's that? Lightning-fast boot on any hardware.

data.name: Apkg is a declarative APT repository platform that lets you host signed Debian repositories, mirror upstream archives, and publish your own .apkg packages — all fully on-premise. Integrates seamlessly with AnduinOS for painless apt update && apt install workflows across your entire fleet.
data.value: Apkg is a declarative APT repository platform that lets you host signed Debian repositories, mirror upstream archives, and publish your own .apkg packages — all fully on-premise. Integrates seamlessly with AnduinOS for painless apt update && apt install workflows across your entire fleet.

data.name: Built for business. Air-gapped by design.
data.value: Built for business. Air-gapped by design.

data.name: Built on a rock-solid foundation. Designed for the enterprise.
data.value: Built on a rock-solid foundation. Designed for the enterprise.

data.name: Built on the same infrastructure that powers AnduinOS package delivery. Push updates to your entire fleet with a single command.
data.value: Built on the same infrastructure that powers AnduinOS package delivery. Push updates to your entire fleet with a single command.

data.name: Bulk operations across your entire fleet
data.value: Bulk operations across your entire fleet

data.name: Compatible with virtually any PC hardware manufactured in the last decade.
data.value: Compatible with virtually any PC hardware manufactured in the last decade.

data.name: Control and configure thousands of devices and policies efficiently from a single dashboard.
data.value: Control and configure thousands of devices and policies efficiently from a single dashboard.

data.name: Control, customize, and secure thousands of devices with enterprise tools built for scale.
data.value: Control, customise, and secure thousands of devices with enterprise tools built for scale.

data.name: Data stays on your servers. Authentication and authorization ensure only your team can access your metrics.
data.value: Data stays on your servers. Authentication and authorisation ensure only your team can access your metrics.

data.name: Deploy at scale, manage centrally, enjoy the enterprise edition!
data.value: Deploy at scale, manage centrally, enjoy the enterprise edition!

data.name: Deploy interactive kiosks, information displays, and self-service terminals on standard PC hardware.
data.value: Deploy interactive kiosks, information displays, and self-service terminals on standard PC hardware.

data.name: Distribute your own software packages internally via standard apt protocol. Take control of your enterprise package ecosystem.
data.value: Distribute your own software packages internally via the standard apt protocol. Take control of your enterprise package ecosystem.

data.name: Get the AnduinOS image from our site
data.value: Get the AnduinOS image from our site

data.name: Get up-to-the-second updates on every AnduinOS device's CPU, memory, disk, and network usage.
data.value: Get up-to-the-second updates on every AnduinOS device's CPU, memory, disk, and network usage.

data.name: Graphical applications are installed via Flatpak, and keep themselves separate from the base system. They also allow for fine-grained control over their permissions.
data.value: Graphical applications are installed via Flatpak, keeping them separate from the base system. They also allow for fine-grained control over permissions.

data.name: Kiosk mode prevents unauthorized access. Users can only interact with your approved application, keeping your deployment secure.
data.value: Kiosk mode prevents unauthorised access. Users can only interact with your approved application, keeping your deployment secure.

data.name: Low-overhead agents collect metrics without impacting your AnduinOS devices' performance. Deploy in seconds with Docker.
data.value: Low-overhead agents collect metrics without impacting the performance of your AnduinOS devices. Deploy in seconds with Docker.

data.name: Monitor thousands of AnduinOS devices from a single centralized dashboard. Scale as your fleet grows.
data.value: Monitor thousands of AnduinOS devices from a single centralised dashboard. Scale as your fleet grows.

data.name: Offline repository mirrors for air-gapped networks
data.value: Offline repository mirrors for air-gapped networks

data.name: Privacy is no longer optional. It's essential. AnduinOS is designed to gather nothing from you. We don't track you. We don't profile you. We don't target you. You remain anonymous to the system.
data.value: Privacy is no longer optional. It’s essential. AnduinOS is designed to gather nothing from you. We don’t track you. We don’t profile you. We don’t target you. You remain anonymous to the system.

data.name: Replace system logo and boot screen
data.value: Replace system logo and boot screen

data.name: Role-based access control for IT teams
data.value: Role-based access control for IT teams

data.name: Run your own APT infrastructure behind the firewall. No external dependencies, no proprietary agents — just standard apt.
data.value: Run your own APT infrastructure behind the firewall. No external dependencies, no proprietary agents — just standard apt.

data.name: Runs smoothly on older devices. Extends hardware lifespan by being resource-efficient, so you don't need to buy new machines.
data.value: Runs smoothly on older devices. Extends hardware lifespan by being resource-efficient, so you don't need to buy new machines.

data.name: Set up your system in under 5 minutes
data.value: Set up your system in under 5 minutes

data.name: Simple, user-friendly. Broad compatibility with virtually all PC hardware.
data.value: Simple, user-friendly. Broad compatibility with virtually all PC hardware.

data.name: Smaller image, friendly interface, unbeatable performance, safe and secure.
data.value: Smaller image, friendly interface, unbeatable performance, safe and secure.

data.name: StatHub is a simple, real-time server monitoring system designed for local deployment. Keep an eye on your entire AnduinOS infrastructure with intuitive dashboards and detailed metrics — all from a single pane of glass.
data.value: StatHub is a simple, real-time server monitoring system designed for local deployment. Keep an eye on your entire AnduinOS infrastructure with intuitive dashboards and detailed metrics — all from a single pane of glass.

data.name: Sync, sign, and promote atomically via rename(2). APT clients never see half-written metadata — only consistent, signed snapshots.
data.value: Synchronise, sign, and promote atomically via rename(2). APT clients never see half-written metadata — only consistent, signed snapshots.

data.name: System updates apply automatically when you restart. Zero maintenance windows — just reboot, and you're on the latest version.
data.value: System updates are applied automatically when you restart. No maintenance windows – simply reboot, and you’ll be on the latest version.

data.name: The GNOME-based desktop environment has beautiful interfaces and human-computer interactions that fit user habits, allowing you to quickly get started with AnduinOS without too much learning cost.
data.value: The GNOME-based desktop environment features elegant interfaces and intuitive interactions that align with user habits, enabling you to get started with AnduinOS quickly and with minimal effort.

data.name: The ISO is just 2.4GB in size. Similar to Ubuntu, it is simple to install and can meet your daily needs without additional configuration or complicated operations.
data.value: The ISO is just 2.4GB in size. Like Ubuntu, it is straightforward to install and meets everyday needs without further configuration or complex operations.

data.name: The operating system your enterprise needs — familiar, beautiful, stable, mature, and easy to manage. AnduinOS Enterprise is built on Linux 7.0, GNOME 50, and Ubuntu 26.04, keeping your team in a comfortable, productive environment.
data.value: The operating system your business needs — familiar, beautiful, stable, mature, and easy to manage. AnduinOS Enterprise is built on Linux 7.0, GNOME 50, and Ubuntu 26.04, keeping your team in a comfortable, productive environment.

data.name: Tired of your sluggish OS slowing you down? Switch to AnduinOS for instant speed and seamless performance.
data.value: Fed up with a sluggish OS dragging you down? Switch to AnduinOS for instant speed and seamless performance.

data.name: Transform any PC into a secure, managed kiosk. Our in-house kiosk content management suite is available now — try it today.
data.value: Transform any PC into a secure, managed kiosk. Our in-house kiosk content management suite is available now — try it today.

data.name: Turn any screen into a kiosk
data.value: Turn any screen into a kiosk

data.name: Update content, push configurations, and monitor device health — all from the cloud. No need for on-site visits.
data.value: Update content, push configurations, and monitor device health — all from the cloud. No need for on-site visits.

data.name: With just a few clicks, you can have AnduinOS running on any machine. Enjoy automatic updates, built-in security, and remote management from the cloud — so once deployed, it just works.
data.value: With just a few clicks, you can have AnduinOS running on any machine. Enjoy automatic updates, built-in security, and remote management from the cloud — so once deployed, it just works.

data.name: Write the image to a USB drive
data.value: Write the image to a USB drive
